# BLAS differential precision report

**Status:** PASS

**Coverage:** 1125 routines × 3 targets = 3373 report files, 16868 test cases.
**Targets:** kind10, kind16, multifloats

Each test runs the same operation through the migrated extended-precision routine and through a REAL(KIND=16) reference (Netlib BLAS compiled with `-freal-8-real-16`). Results are compared in REAL(KIND=16); the table reports the worst-case relative error converted to decimal digits of agreement.

## Per-routine summary

Worst-case agreement (in decimal digits) across all problem shapes per routine, per target. "exact" means bit-identical agreement (max_rel_err = 0) — typical for kind16 since both reference and target are REAL(KIND=16). A `✗` marks a failed case (max_rel_err exceeded its tolerance).
